Title: Create Event - Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data:
- Event Name: Test Event
- Date: 2023-10-10
- Type: Social Gathering
- Creator: TestUser
- City: Rome
- Description: A fun social gathering.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the city search screen.
3. Search for and select a city.
4. Click on the option to add an event.
5. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
6. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and displayed on the city view screen.

Title: Modify Event - Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created an event.
Test Data:
- New Event Name: Modified Event
- New Date: 2023-10-15
- New Type: Conference
- New Description: An updated conference event.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the city view screen where the event is listed.
3. Scroll down and click on the pencil icon to modify the event.
4. Fill in the modified details.
5. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Event is modified successfully, and the updated details are reflected on the city view screen.
